n: C31:scanned 2018-2022 bugs (#10324-#14289, ~100 issues). Found #14152 fixed (hash directives in dotted module paths). Still-open confirmed: #6338(literal in rec modules), #5795(attrs in rec modules), #4654(private type ext leaks), #13832(doval sig gen), #13516(recursive ns in FSI), #14160(FSI interp string parsing), #13981(dup sig no error).
